user.title: Connect to Edibl
user.description: Enter your Edibl URL. If Edibl runs the Home Assistant add-on, map port 7746 and use http://homeassistant.local:7746. A long-lived API token (edbl_…) is optional when Edibl runs in single-tenant mode.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Edibl at that URL.

abort.already_configured: This Edibl instance is already configured.
